raw.message: You Know YOU Deserve it - Play Now & Enjoy!

hook.summary: UGC direct address to Slotomania players offering free coins.
hook.visual_action: A young woman speaks directly to the camera in a casual, home setting.
hook.text_overlay: this is for all my Slotomania players
hook.voiceover_transcript: This is for all my Slotomania players. If you haven't already claimed your free coins

scene_flow: UGC creator addresses current players with a call to claim free coins.
Visual transition to a scrolling menu of over 200 slot game options.
Fast-paced montage of high-action slot gameplay and jackpot wins.
Highlight of the newest slot machine 'Journey Down The Nile' with a 'Check It Out' prompt.
Final end card with game branding and a direct call to action to play.
on_screen_text: this is for all my Slotomania players
if you haven't already claimed your free coins
now's the time compete with friends
there's new machines and rewards added weekly
audience_proxy: Adults 35-60 who enjoy social casino games and the excitement of frequent rewards and new content.
